headline: UBS Expects T-Mobile (TMUS) To Lead The Sector With 700,000 Postpaid Phone Additions In Q2
summary: With 85 hedge funds holding bullish positions and analysts seeing 44.40% upside potential, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) ranks among the top stocks to buy for financial stability. Investor focus on T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) has increasingly centered on the balance between steady subscriber growth and rising regulatory and competitive scrutiny, as market conditions in the […]
